ddls:
CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., gene, protein, microbe) */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* DNA or protein sequence of the feature */,
  "structure" TEXT /* Three-dimensional structure of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communities" (
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community */,
  "community_name" TEXT /* Name of the community */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the community */,
  "community_type" TEXT /* Type of community (e.g., microbial, protein-protein interaction) */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the community exists (e.g., gut, soil, ocean) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_communities" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature being assigned */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community being assigned to */,
  "community_assignment" REAL /* Assignment value (e.g., probability of membership) */,
  "membership_probability" REAL /* Probability of the feature belonging to the community */,
  "community_role" TEXT /* Role of the feature within the community (e.g., keystone species, hub protein) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_communities_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_communities_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "centrality_measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measure */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature being measured */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community being measured in */,
  "centrality_type" TEXT /* Type of centrality measure (e.g., degree, betweenness, closeness) */,
  "centrality_value" REAL /* Calculated centrality value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_centrality_measures_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_centrality_measures_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_license" TEXT /* License under which the data is available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., database, literature) */,
  "source_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data source (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "source_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data source (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id", "feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis */,
  "analysis_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the analysis (e.g., algorithm, settings) */,
  "analysis_software" TEXT /* Software used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis that produced the result */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the result */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  "result_format" TEXT /* Format of the result (e.g., image, table, text) */,
  "result_interpretation" TEXT /* Interpretation of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request (e.g., GET, POST) */,
  "request_payload" TEXT /* Payload of the request */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the API request (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken for the API to respond */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "feature1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first feature involved in the interaction */,
  "feature2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second feature involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., protein-protein interaction, gene regulation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_interactions_feature1_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature1_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_interactions_feature2_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature2_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_evolution" (
  "evolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evolution event */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community being tracked */,
  "time_point" TEXT /* Time point at which the community composition was measured */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition under which the community composition was measured (e.g., temperature, pH) */,
  "composition" TEXT /* Composition of the community at the given time point and condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_evolution_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality measurement */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being measured */,
  "quality_metric" TEXT /* Metric used to evaluate the quality of the data (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "quality_value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_pipelines" (
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pipeline */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis being performed */,
  "tool" TEXT /* Tool used in the pipeline (e.g., NetworkX, igraph) */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter used with the tool (e.g., algorithm, setting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pipeline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_pipelines_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)
